---
title: "Week 00: AI-Assisted Coding Prep"
subtitle: "Moved — see AI Coding Prep in the Knowledge Base"
date: "2026-04-14"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## This page has moved

Week 0 has been retired as a course session. Its content has been split:

- **Tool setup, environment, prompting habits for code** → [AI Coding Prep](../da-knowledge/ai-coding-prep.qmd) in the Knowledge Base. Read it once before Week 1.
- **Prompting for code (in-class)** → folded into [Week 2](../week02/index.qmd).
- **Creating Graphs exercise** → moved earlier to [Week 6: From Data to Report](../week06/index.qmd) and the [Creating Graphs walkthrough](../da-knowledge/creating-graphs.qmd).
- **VS Code + Copilot setup** → [VS Code + Copilot Setup](../da-knowledge/vscode-setup.qmd).
- **AI CLI installation** → [Installing AI CLI Tools](../da-knowledge/install-cli.qmd) (Week 4).

:::
